notes: IMD Northwest division: Arabian Sea branch monsoon hits Gujarat/Rajasthan Jun-Jul; dense fog Dec-Feb on NH48 causing major delays; dust storms (andhi) Apr-May
Winter fog: NH48 Delhi-Jaipur and NH44 Delhi-Chandigarh experience 0-visibility fog; flights cancelled; trucks parked; worst logistics window of year in North India

IMD East/Northeast division: Bay of Bengal branch brings heavy rainfall to Odisha/Bengal/Northeast; cyclones (Oct-Nov) cause severe disruption to coastal routes NH16; Guwahati floods regularly cut NE connectivity
Cyclone season: Bay of Bengal cyclones (Amphan/Yaas/Fani pattern) devastate coastal AP/Odisha; L3(Bhubaneswar) and L10(Visakhapatnam) worst hit; road and rail washouts for 1-3 weeks

IMD South Peninsular division: Kerala monsoon onset (Jun 1 avg); heavy rainfall on Western Ghats blocks NH544 Bengaluru-Kochi and NH66 coastal route; Wayanad/Kodagu landslides recurrent; Chennai floods (Nov) hit R1 severely

Northeast monsoon: Tamil Nadu and southern AP receive bulk of annual rainfall Oct-Dec; Chennai (R1) floods 2015/2021 pattern; Coimbatore (L4) and Kochi (L5) logistics severely impacted; NH544 mountain sections close
